title: Record a token-efficiency improvement contract
prompt: Create reports/token-efficiency-contract.md with sections for Context ladder, Tool budgets, Research defaults, Proof path, and Rollback note.

fixtureActions.content:
# Token Efficiency Contract

## Context ladder
micro40/keep2/min4 · async5 · handoff20 · soft17 · maxRecent3 · reserved4k · spec800 · recompact1.0 · pblock6/3 · hard52 · abs36k

## Tool budgets
tool results 1k/18 · command preview 4 · result preview 1 · thinking glance 1 · swarm 120/3.5k/inline25 · grep head 80

## Research defaults
WebSearch defaults to 4 hits; sharpen query before raising limit; FetchURL for primary sources

## Proof path
focused vitest + /bench loop evidence under .superliora/bench

## Rollback note
revert denser defaults if routing or recall quality regresses
